name: Chain of Thought
description: Explicit step-by-step reasoning before the final answer
content: Reasoning technique: Before giving your final answer, explicitly write out your chain of thought. Label your reasoning steps (Step 1, Step 2, ...). Show intermediate values, intermediate conclusions, and any decisions made at each step. Only state your final answer after completing the full reasoning chain. If you realize a mistake mid-chain, cross it out explicitly and continue with the corrected path.
